---
title: "HGIS-to-LINCS – Modelling"
subtitle: "A hands-on workshop for historians converting historical GIS data to Linked Open Data"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This is a workshop session for the **[HGIS to LOD Workshop](https://jburnford.github.io/claude_code_workshop/workshop-event.html)** taking place April 15--17 in Ottawa. This is the April 15 session about data modelling.
For more information, see the [main workshop website](https://jburnford.github.io/claude_code_workshop/workshop-event.html).
:::

## What This Workshop Session Is About

This workshop session is about data modelling with CIDOC CRM, following the practices of the LINCS project. It is not specifically about modelling with LLMs, but rather, it tries to convey the process of modelling a dataset.

For more info, see the [main workshop website](https://jburnford.github.io/claude_code_workshop/workshop-event.html).

## Schedule

1. [Basic Graph Patterns](./graph-patterns.html)
2. [Exercise 1](./modelling-exercise-1.html)
3. [Advanced Patterns](./advanced-patterns.html)
4. [Exercise 2](./modelling-exercise-2.html)
5. [LLMs for Modelling](./modelling-llms.html)
6. [Exercise 3](./modelling-exercise-3.html)
7. [Reference Diagram](./reference-diagram.html)
